notes: [2026-07-17T15:06:13+00:00] music domain online: film-score background beds under music/, each with sub-second metadata.json (sections, beat grid, onsets, RMS curve, key/scale for in-key SFX pitching). First track composing: nangijala_cherry_valley.

requests.text: music/ domain is live. Read music/viewer_data.json for tracks; each track's metadata.json has beats_s/downbeats_s/onsets/peaks + rms curve + sfx_safe_pitch_classes so you can sync effects and pitch footsteps in-key. First bed: nangijala_cherry_valley (overworld, D major, 76 BPM, loopable). Post requests to 'music' for new scenes/feelings.
